title: Zhao Xingsha
content:
Zhao Xingsha
 is a member of the Purple Division of the 
Heavenly Fate Sect
 on 
Planet Tian Yun
. He has been in the purple division for the longest time amongst his contemporaries but he has only recently become the True-Disciple of Purple Division.

Appearance
[
]

He is a gentle looking man.

Background
[
]

Amongst 
All Seer
's first generation disciples, he has been in the sect for the longest.

In the past, when he received the title of the True-Disciple of Purple Division, 
Sun Yun
 suddenly came and was defeated by him. Then, soon after Sun Yun disappeared.

He attacked 
Bai Wei
 (most likely on All-Seer's orders) when he about to separate his dead sister's soul. This caused her soul to get stuck to his. This was further aggravated by cultivating the Celestial Double Desire Art that All-Seer gave him.

History
[
]

Many centuries later, when he received the title of the True-Disciple of Purple Division, 
Wang Lin
 suddenly came to 
Planet Tian Yun
 and was defeated by him. Subsequently, Wang Lin was defeated by 
Sun Tao
 who became the True-Disciple of Purple Division, once again. Still, he had deep hatred for Wang Lin.

Many centuries later, when Wang Lin returned to the Heavenly Fate Sect. he could finally get his revenge against Wang Lin and he was not shocked when he learnt that Wang Lin had reached 
Nirvana Scryer
 so when he saw him hold his own against 
Ling Tianhou
. He instantly won fighting against Wang Lin and showed off his great cultivation.
